panels.title: Average CPU Utilization
panels.description: Average CPU utilization across the selected time range, using used versus total cluster CPU cores.

panels.title: Peak CPU Utilization
panels.description: Peak CPU utilization observed in the selected time range.

panels.title: Average GPU Utilization
panels.description: Average GPU utilization across the selected time range, using used versus total cluster GPU devices.

panels.title: Peak GPU Utilization
panels.description: Peak GPU utilization observed in the selected time range.

panels.title: CPU Cores Used vs Total
panels.description: Current used and total CPU cores for the whole PBS cluster.

panels.title: GPU Devices Used vs Total
panels.description: Current used and total GPU devices for the whole PBS cluster.

panels.title: Cluster Resource Pressure
panels.description: Current CPU, GPU, and memory pressure. Values near red indicate saturated shared resources.

panels.title: Cluster Utilization Trend
panels.description: Cluster CPU, GPU, and memory utilization trend for the selected time range.

panels.title: Job Status Distribution
panels.description: Current job distribution by PBS job state.

panels.title: Total Jobs
panels.description: Current total jobs visible to the exporter.

panels.title: Job Activity by Status
panels.description: Current job counts by PBS state over time.

panels.title: Queue Throughput Trend
panels.description: Running and total jobs by queue over time. Use it for broad queue activity trends, not detailed queue health.

panels.title: Queued Jobs
panels.description: Current queued jobs across all queues. This excludes running, held, finished, and exiting jobs.
Current queued jobs per queue, sorted to keep busy queues readable.
panels.title: Queued Jobs by Queue

panels.description: Current running jobs per queue. Compare with queued jobs to spot stalled or overloaded queues.
panels.title: Running Jobs by Queue

panels.description: Enabled and started state for each queue. Any red entry means the queue is disabled or stopped.
panels.title: Queue Availability

panels.description: Current p95 wait time per queue derived from snapshot bucket metrics. Do not use rate() on these buckets.
panels.title: Queue Wait p95

panels.description: Queues with the oldest currently queued job. This is the fastest panel for spotting starvation.
panels.title: Oldest Queued Job

panels.description: Cluster-wide count of queued jobs waiting longer than 1 day, 2 days, and 5 days.
panels.title: Backlog Past SLA Thresholds

panels.description: Aggregated queued-job wait distribution over time. Y buckets are wait thresholds; color shows job count in each cumulative bucket.
panels.title: Queue Wait Distribution Heatmap

panels.description: Current average wait time per queue, sorted by the queues with the highest average wait.
panels.title: Average Wait by Queue
Top Users by Running Jobs
panels.description: Top users by running jobs. User-labeled metrics must be enabled in exporter configuration.

panels.title: Top Users by Queued Jobs
panels.description: Top users by queued jobs. User-labeled metrics must be enabled in exporter configuration.

panels.title: Node Status Overview
panels.description: Current PBS node state distribution.
Current CPU, GPU, and memory utilization ratios across the whole cluster.
panels.title: Resource Utilization Now

panels.description: Top 20 nodes by current CPU utilization. Horizontal bars stay readable with many nodes.
panels.title: Top CPU Nodes

panels.description: Top 20 nodes by current GPU utilization. Nodes without GPUs are naturally absent from the ranking.
panels.title: Top GPU Nodes

panels.description: Top 20 nodes by current memory utilization, based on used versus total node memory.
panels.title: Top Memory Nodes
Exporter Status
panels.description: Exporter readiness based on the latest valid PBS snapshot.

panels.title: Last Collect Duration
panels.description: Duration of the last background PBS collection.

panels.title: Collector Timing
panels.description: Collector runtime and snapshot age. Rising snapshot age indicates collection lag or failures.

panels.title: Collect Errors Total
panels.description: Total PBS collection errors since exporter start.

panels.title: Age Since Last Success
panels.description: Seconds since the latest successful PBS collection.
